item.title: How Push detects and blocks phishing attacks in the browser

item.title: Analyzing "Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters" breaches since 2021
item.description: How Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters breaches demonstrate the evolution of attacker TTPs, shaping the future of cyber attacks.

item.title: Cyber Essentials 2026: Mandatory MFA on ALL cloud services
item.description: Big changes are being made to the Cyber Essentials scheme in 2026 that will change how companies must validate compliance. Hereâs what you need to know.

item.title: Push + Cloud Security: What do you do when bad looks normal?
item.description: Why cloud security tools only give you part of the picture when it comes to modern attacks.

item.title: Push + Endpoint Security: Extending D&R to the browser
item.description: Why extending detection and response into the browser is crucial in the face of modern attacks that consciously evade the network and endpoint.

item.title: Push + Network Security: Seeing packets vs securing sessions
item.description: Why network and web traffic only gives you part of the picture when it comes to modern browser-based attacks.

item.title: Unpacking the latest SLH phishing campaign
item.description: Analysing the latest Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters (SLH) phishing campaign targeting hundreds of organizations.

item.description: New insights on the ConsentFix campaign stopped by Push.

item.title: Analysing the malvertising criminal ecosystem
item.description: Attackers are going out of their way to target Google Ad Manager accounts, powering malvertising scams. Hereâs what you need to know.

item.title: Google Search malvertising campaign impersonating Ahrefs
item.description: New samples linked to a Push-tracked malvertising campaign detected, targeting Google accounts via an Ahrefs lure.
